gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Epicurus initially blocked on unresolvable adapter extras, runtime-only typed module aliases, python -m alias failure, dead future repo URLs, and docs contradiction; after fixes, Epicurus approved with no findings.

installed-wheel smoke for cachet/document_kv_cache/restaurant_kv_serving imports and cachet.workflow alias identity -> passed
gh pr checks 302 --watch -> Test and build passed

what_changed: Exposed public document modules through typed cachet.<module> facades while preserving document_kv_cache implementation module identity for runtime imports.
Renamed the GitHub repository to puyuanOT/cachet and updated project URLs/docs while keeping the transitional document-kv-cache distribution name.
Kept vLLM/SGLang serving-engine packages out of Cachet optional dependencies until adapter wheels are published or vendored under release-safe extras.
why: Make Cachet the primary repository and import surface without breaking existing document_kv_cache imports, Databricks evidence paths, or native-probe validation.
